Name: Frontend Chat UI
Description: Serves the main patient-facing chat interface.

Name: Admin Dashboard UI
Description: Serves the staff dashboard for managing appointments.

Name: List All Appointments
Description: Fetches all booked appointments (Used by the Admin Dashboard).

Name: Cancel Appointment
Description: Hard cancels an appointment by ID and frees the database slot.

Name: Reschedule Appointment
Description: Overwrites an existing appointment with a new date and time.

Name: Agentic AI Chat
Description: Handles Natural Language conversations. Dynamically routes to internal tools to check availability, triage symptoms, generate appointment proof receipts, and execute bookings based on human approval.
